title: Fernando Villegas
text: Home * People * Fernando Villegas Fernando Villegas [1] Fernando Villegas , a Chilean writer, journalist, sociologist affiliated with the University of Chile , chess player and computer chess promoter and tester, and frequent poster and moderator in Computer Chess Forums .
